name: Org Agenda Lab

records.title: Prototype source block navigation
records.bodyPreview:
Multiple Org files should feel like a blog index first, then become records,
agenda groups, and AI handoff context once selected.

records.outline: Blog / Explain source blocks as the primary IA
records.title: Explain source blocks as the primary IA
records.bodyPreview:
The left rail is not a settings drawer. It is the reader-facing entry point for
Org documents.

records.outline: Records / Capture feedback on sidebar density
records.title: Capture feedback on sidebar density
records.bodyPreview:
The source switcher needs enough metadata to be understood without stealing the
agenda workbench's main space.

records.outline: Records / Collect future content metadata fields
records.title: Collect future content metadata fields
records.bodyPreview:
Future config can add description, cover, series, and publication state for each
Org source block.

records.title: Add richer source cards
records.bodyPreview: Cards can later expose parsed title, tags, todo count, and last modified data.

records.title: Keep selector workspace independent
records.bodyPreview:
The agenda workbench should survive source switching without losing its current
program mode.

html:
Prototype source block navigation

Multiple Org files should feel like a blog index first, then become records, agenda groups, and AI handoff context once selected.

Blog

Explain source blocks as the primary IA

The left rail is not a settings drawer. It is the reader-facing entry point for Org documents.

Records

Capture feedback on sidebar density

The source switcher needs enough metadata to be understood without stealing the agenda workbench's main space.

Collect future content metadata fields

Future config can add description, cover, series, and publication state for each Org source block.

Agenda

Add richer source cards

Cards can later expose parsed title, tags, todo count, and last modified data.

Keep selector workspace independent

The agenda workbench should survive source switching without losing its current program mode.
